# Outbound-HTTP call sites in the shipped distribution archive, as
# "relative/path.php<TAB>marker", sorted. scripts/validate-dist.sh regenerates
# this list from the built zip (vendor included) and fails on any difference.
# A new entry means a new way for the plugin to contact the network: it must
# be opt-in and OFF by default in the wp.org build (WP.org Guidelines 7 & 9,
# behind the SCOLTA_AUTO_PROVISION_DEFAULT / explicit-key consent gates) and
# the service disclosed in readme.txt == External Services == before this
# manifest is updated in an explicit commit.
#
# Current entries, each mapped to its disclosed service:
# - cli/class-scolta-cli.php: wp scolta download-pagefind queries the GitHub
#   API for the latest Pagefind release (wp_remote_get) and downloads the
#   release archive from github.com via WP core's download_url() —
#   readme.txt "GitHub API" and "Pagefind Binary".
# - vendor/guzzlehttp/guzzle: the curl transport used exclusively by
#   tag1/scolta-php's AiClient (api.anthropic.com, api.openai.com,
#   admin-configured OpenAI-compatible endpoints) and AmazeeClient
#   (api.amazee.ai) — readme.txt "AI Provider APIs" and "Amazee.ai".
cli/class-scolta-cli.php	download_url
cli/class-scolta-cli.php	wp_remote_get
vendor/guzzlehttp/guzzle/src/Handler/CurlFactory.php	curl_init
vendor/guzzlehttp/guzzle/src/Handler/CurlHandler.php	curl_exec
vendor/guzzlehttp/guzzle/src/Utils.php	curl_exec
